006package com.stuypulse.robot.constants;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.Amps;
009
010import com.pathplanner.lib.config.PIDConstants;
011import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Current;
012
013public class Gains {
014
015    public interface Shooter {
016
017        double kP = 0.9;
018
019        double kI = 0;
020
021        double kD = 0;
022
023        double kS = 0;
024
025        double kV = 0;
026
027        double kA = 0;
028    }
029
030    // public interface Feeder {
031    // double kP = 0.1;
032    // double kI = 0.01;
033    // double kD = 0;
034    // double kS = 0.0;
035    // SmartNumber kV = new SmartNumber("Feeder/kV", 5.0);
036    // SmartNumber kA = new SmartNumber("Feeder/kA", 0.5);
037    // double kG = 0.0;
038    // }
039    public interface Intake {
040
041        // pivot gains
042        double kP = 300;
043
044        double kI = 0;
045
046        double kD = 75;
047
048        Current kS = Amps.of(0);
049
050        Current kV = Amps.of(0);
051
052        Current kA = Amps.of(0);
053
054        Current kG = Amps.of(-13);
055
056        public interface Digestion {
057
058            double kP = 200;
059
060            double kI = 0;
061
062            // TODO: tune
063            double kD = 55;
064        }
065    }
066
067    public interface Swerve {
068
069        public interface Drive {
070
071            double kS = 0.0;
072
073            double kV = 0.124;
074
075            double kA = 0.0;
076
077            double kP = 0.1;
078
079            double kI = 0.0;
080
081            double kD = 0.0;
082        }
083
084        public interface Turn {
085
086            double kS = 0.1;
087
088            double kV = 2.66;
089
090            double kA = 0.0;
091
092            double kP = 100.0;
093
094            double kI = 0.0;
095
096            double kD = 0.5;
097        }
098
099        public interface Alignment {
100
101            double kP = 1.0;
102
103            double kI = 0.0;
104
105            double kD = 0.0;
106
107            double akP = 0.88624;
108
109            double akI = 0.0;
110
111            double akD = 0.0;
112
113            double akS = 0.33753;
114
115            double akV = 0.97475;
116
117            double akA = 0.095509;
118
119            PIDConstants XY = new PIDConstants(10, 0.0, 0.0);
120
121            PIDConstants THETA = new PIDConstants(10, 0.0, 0.0);
122        }
123    }
124}
